name: Popcorn Crackles
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Add sugar, salt, and molasses to the melted butter.
3. Cook the mixture until it reaches the hard crack stage (285 - 290°F).
4. Pour the hot syrup over the popped corn.
5. Stir quickly while pouring to coat all of the popcorn evenly.
6. Spread the coated popcorn in a single layer on a cooling rack or baking sheet.
7. Allow the popcorn to cool and break into pieces.
